name: St. Elizabeth Catholic School
description: This gym is a Catholic School gym with the primary function of the school. They allow some recreational play after school hours. Call St. Elizabeth office for availability scheduling at 662-624-4239. The principal Mrs. Sara Cauthen has information or can provide a contact person for after hours play.
open_play_schedule: This facility may not always be available due to School events and if school is out or in session.
